book.title: The Great Gatsby
book.author: F. Scott Fitzgerald
book.description: A story of wealth, love, and the American Dream in the Roaring Twenties. A timeless classic of American literature.

book.title: To Kill a Mockingbird
book.author: Harper Lee
book.description: A powerful novel about racial injustice and the loss of innocence in the American South. A Pulitzer Prize winner.

book.title: Pride and Prejudice
book.author: Jane Austen
book.description: The witty and romantic story of Elizabeth Bennet and the proud Mr. Darcy. One of the greatest novels in English literature.

book.author: George Orwell
book.description: A chilling dystopian novel about totalitarianism, surveillance, and the destruction of truth in a future society.

book.title: Short Stories of O. Henry
book.author: O. Henry
book.description: A classic collection of short stories with surprising twists. Perfect for readers who love clever, witty narratives.

book.title: Atomic Habits
book.author: James Clear
book.description: Proven strategies to build good habits and break bad ones for lasting change. The #1 self-improvement book of the decade.

book.title: The Alchemist
book.author: Paulo Coelho
book.description: An inspiring journey of a young shepherd pursuing his Personal Legend. A life-changing book read by millions worldwide.

book.title: The Power of Your Subconscious Mind
book.author: Joseph Murphy
book.description: Unlock the potential of your subconscious mind to achieve success, health, and happiness in every area of life.

book.title: Think and Grow Rich
book.author: Napoleon Hill
book.description: The classic guide to achieving wealth and success through the power of positive thinking and definite purpose.

book.title: You Can Win
book.author: Shiv Khera
book.description: A step-by-step tool for top achievers. One of India's most popular motivational books with practical wisdom for success.

book.title: Engineering Mathematics
book.author: B.S. Grewal
book.description: The most widely used engineering mathematics textbook in India. Covers all topics for BE/BTech examinations comprehensively.

book.title: Data Structures and Algorithms
book.author: Narasimha Karumanchi
book.description: Master data structures and algorithms with clear explanations and 700+ problems. Essential for CSE students and interviews.

book.title: Principles of Electronics
book.author: V.K. Mehta
book.description: A comprehensive textbook for ECE students covering semiconductors, circuits, amplifiers, and digital electronics.

book.title: Strength of Materials
book.author: R.K. Bansal
book.description: Standard reference for Mechanical and Civil engineering students. Covers stress, strain, beams, and structural analysis.

book.title: Computer Organization and Architecture
book.author: William Stallings
book.description: The definitive guide to computer organization, covering processor design, memory systems, and I/O architecture for CSE.

book.title: Python Crash Course
book.author: Eric Matthes
book.description: The world's best-selling Python book. Learn Python fast with hands-on projects including web apps, games, and data visualization.

book.title: Head First Java
book.author: Kathy Sierra and Bert Bates
book.description: The most fun and engaging way to learn Java. Uses visuals, puzzles, and real-world examples to teach OOP concepts clearly.

book.title: JavaScript: The Good Parts
book.author: Douglas Crockford
book.description: A deep dive into the best features of JavaScript. Essential reading for every web developer building modern applications.

book.title: Artificial Intelligence: A Modern Approach
book.author: Stuart Russell and Peter Norvig
book.description: The standard AI textbook used worldwide. Covers search, knowledge representation, machine learning, and deep learning fundamentals.

book.title: Clean Code
book.author: Robert C. Martin
book.description: Learn how to write readable, maintainable, and professional code. A must-read for every software developer and engineer.

book.title: Harry Potter and the Sorcerer Stone
book.author: J.K. Rowling
book.description: The magical beginning of the beloved series about a boy who discovers he is a wizard. Perfect for children and adults alike.

book.title: The Lion, the Witch and the Wardrobe
book.author: C.S. Lewis
book.description: Four children step through a wardrobe into the magical land of Narnia. A timeless fantasy adventure for young readers.

book.title: Charlie and the Chocolate Factory
book.author: Roald Dahl
book.description: Charlie wins a golden ticket to visit Willy Wonka's incredible chocolate factory. A delightful story loved by children worldwide.

book.title: Panchatantra Stories
book.author: Vishnu Sharma
book.description: Ancient Indian fables that teach wisdom, friendship, and moral values through animal stories. A treasure for every Indian child.

book.title: My First Encyclopedia
book.author: DK Publishing
book.description: A beautifully illustrated learning book for curious young minds. Covers animals, science, space, history, and the human body.
